task.summary: Add findIterator and findStream functions and fix memory/resource leaks

Add newer features, fix minor bugs and full rewrite towards codegen
- Added features such as lazy everything (Maps, sets and queues and existing stuff, not just lists and proxies) - Added SqlTokenizer for faster and more featureful decoding of statements - Added ifError checks to TransactionResults that regular users cannot see - Fully rewrote the reflection system into codegen (all on the hot-path, and only a few in start-up and cold-path)
Codegen system, new Query API, new JSON system and split into many files
Codegen system, new Query API, fixes and other misc changes/optimizations
Fix microservices TypeResolvers not being registered properly

Add kotlin extension for better support
- Add suspend functions to RepositoryAdapter - Add runSuspend to DatabaseSession - Add kotlin-only extensions to TransactionResult
Add runVoid, runAsync and run for automatic atomic changes to a session
Add peek, peekErr, recover, recoverWith, filter, fold and toFuture

Codegen, fixes, new Query API, new JSON API
- Fix createFilterDocument using default codec registry (new function, createFilterBson) - Added several null checks for safety - Fixed caches being initialized and used even when not prompted with Cacheable/GlobalCacheable - Update tests
Bump versions and switch to gradle 9, and others
Use SQLRelationshipHandler and micro optimize with lambdas
Micro optimize with lambdas and few fixes
Count function and Query API for all queries.
Cache batch loading and aggregation support
Cache batch loading and aggregation support
Split files into many, fix a few bugs and update tests

MESSAGE.value: Add runVoid, runAsync and run for automatic atomic changes to a session
Add peek, peekErr, recover, recoverWith, filter, fold and toFuture

Codegen, fixes, new Query API, new JSON API
- Fix createFilterDocument using default codec registry (new function, createFilterBson) - Added several null checks for safety - Fixed caches being initialized and used even when not prompted with Cacheable/GlobalCacheable - Update tests
Bump versions and switch to gradle 9, and others
Use SQLRelationshipHandler and micro optimize with lambdas
Micro optimize with lambdas and few fixes
Count function and Query API for all queries.
Cache batch loading and aggregation support
Split files into many, fix a few bugs and update tests
